stemHtml: According to ICAO Annex 17, what is the definition of “Security Control”?

options.a: The application of technical or other means which are intended to identify and/or detect weapons, explosives or other dangerous devices, articles or substances which may be used to commit an act of unlawful interference.
options.b: A means by which the introduction of weapons, explosives or other dangerous devices, articles or substances which may be used to commit an act of unlawful interference can be prevented.
options.c: A check on a person’s identity and previous experience including where legally permissible, any criminal history.
options.d: A secret or public trial of an aviation security measure which simulates an attempt to commit an unlawful act.
